buildFormat: esm module, esbuild-bundled and inlined into the single-file HTML (no CDN, no runtime fetch)
colorManagement: disabled (Strategy A): shader owns ACES tone map + manual sRGB output; renderer.outputColorSpace = LinearSRGBColorSpace, so Three applies no second output transform (r128 parity)
note: Migrated from vendored global three r128 (see vendor/legacy/) to exact-pinned ESM three@0.185.1. Stable renderer is WebGL2-only; WebGPU/TSL is a separate future phase and not part of this build.
